question: How many friends does each student have?
gold_sql: SELECT student_id ,  count(*) FROM Friend GROUP BY student_id
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.name, COUNT(*) FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.id
raw_response: SELECT T1.name, COUNT(*) FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.id
